description: Implement a full ResourceWritePlan compiler for all ResourceStorageKind.RelationalTables resources (not just root-only). Acceptance: for each RelationalResourceModel, compile a TableWritePlan for every DbTableModel in TablesInDependencyOrder with deterministic ColumnBindings and canonical SQL. Emit InsertSql for all tables; emit UpdateSql for any 1:1 table (table key contains no ColumnKind.Ordinal) only when there is at least one stored non-key column to set; and compute BulkInsertBatching via PlanWriteBatchingConventions using ColumnBindings.Count. ColumnBindings must include only ColumnStorage.Stored columns (never UnifiedAlias) and must be in authoritative parameter/value order that matches the emitted InsertSql parameter placeholder order.

Add DeleteByParentSql compilation for replace semantics. Acceptance: for every non-root table plan (any table other than resourceModel.Root), emit DeleteByParentSql with WHERE predicates on exactly the table key columns excluding the table’s own ColumnKind.Ordinal (if present), in key order. Parameter names used in DeleteByParentSql must reuse the same bare parameter names as the corresponding key columns’ WriteColumnBinding.ParameterName (no separate naming). Root-scope _ext tables (1:1 by DocumentId) must emit DeleteByParentSql that deletes by DocumentId (so runtime can remove the row when $._ext.{p} is absent). SQL must be canonicalized (\n only, stable indentation, dialect quoting).
steps-to-verify: Add/adjust unit tests covering delete predicates for: (a) a direct child table, (b) a nested child table, and (c) a root-scope _ext table

description: Implement scope-relative JsonPathExpression compilation for write plans. Acceptance: treat DbColumnModel.SourceJsonPath as absolute and always compile to a scope-relative JsonPathExpression by stripping the table’s DbTableModel.JsonScope prefix segments. If the column path exactly equals the scope path, emit canonical value-at-scope "$" (zero segments). Validate that the scope is a true prefix and that no [*] segments remain after stripping; fail fast otherwise. Use this for WriteValueSource.Scalar, WriteValueSource.DescriptorReference.RelativePath, and key-unification member RelativePath.
steps-to-verify: Add unit tests for: exact scope match -> "$"; scope-not-prefix failure; leftover [*] failure

description: Integrate key unification into write-plan compilation and enforce invariants. Acceptance: for each DbTableModel with KeyUnificationClasses, compile TableWritePlan.KeyUnificationPlans (one per class) and ensure: (1) UnifiedAlias columns are excluded from ColumnBindings and SQL column lists (any attempt to write a UnifiedAlias fails compile); (2) canonical storage columns and synthetic presence flag columns are included in ColumnBindings as WriteValueSource.Precomputed; (3) every WriteValueSource.Precomputed binding is produced by exactly one KeyUnificationWritePlan (no orphan precomputed columns); (4) PresenceIsSynthetic is derived by presenceColumn.SourceJsonPath is null, and synthetic presence columns are validated hard: nullable boolean scalar shape and a matching TableConstraint.NullOrTrue exists, otherwise throw. MembersInOrder must preserve KeyUnificationClass.MemberPathColumns ordering, and member RelativePath must be scope-relative with no [*] segments ("$" allowed for value-at-scope).
steps-to-verify: Add unit tests for: (a) descriptor-member unification, (b) synthetic presence validation (NullOrTrue required), (c) orphan Precomputed failure, (d) UnifiedAlias write exclusion failure

description: Update MappingSetCompiler to compile write plans for every ResourceStorageKind.RelationalTables resource (even when read plans remain gated until story 05/06). Acceptance: MappingSetCompiler must throw (fail the whole mapping set) if any relational-table resource write plan cannot be compiled due to invariant violations. Keep RootOnlyReadPlanCompiler behavior unchanged (root-only read plans only); non-root-only resources must continue to have read plans omitted and read-plan lookup must throw with the existing next-story pointer behavior. Write plans must be present for all relational-table resources so GetWritePlanOrThrow does not emit story-04 ‘omitted’ errors for those resources.
steps-to-verify: Update/extend MappingSetCompilerTests to assert: write plans exist for a multi-table resource; read plan is null/omitted for that resource until story 05

description: Evolve ThinSliceMappingSetManifestJsonEmitter into a general mapping-set manifest emitter. Acceptance: mappingset.manifest.json must include all resources deterministically and represent write_plan and read_plan as either an object or explicit null (never omit the property). For write_plan, emit table_plans_in_dependency_order, each containing: insert_sql_sha256, update_sql_sha256, delete_by_parent_sql_sha256, bulk_insert_batching, column_bindings_in_order (including write_value_source details), and key_unification_plans. Ordering must be deterministic: mapping sets by key; resources by (project_name, resource_name); tables in dependency order; bindings in binding order; key-unification members in member order (do not sort). Update the existing thin-slice golden fixture Fixtures/runtime-plan-compilation/minimal/expected/mappingset.manifest.json to the new schema.
steps-to-verify: Run (to refresh goldens when needed): UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit.csproj

description: Add a multi-project plans fixture builder (core + extension) driven by a tiny fixture manifest file. Acceptance: a fixture folder contains inputs/ with multiple ApiSchema JSON files and a fixture manifest listing input file names and isExtensionProject flags. The builder must load all inputs, build an EffectiveSchemaSet with correct IsExtensionProject flags, and compile DerivedRelationalModelSet for both dialects. Fixture output must be deterministic even if the fixture manifest input order is permuted (builder must canonicalize ordering where required).
steps-to-verify: Add unit tests for the multi-project fixture builder (including determinism under input order reversal)

description: Create a runtime plan compilation golden fixture that covers nested collections + _ext at root and inside collection elements. Acceptance: fixture contains a small base resource with addresses[*] and addresses[*].periods[*] plus a few scalars, and an extension project that adds _ext.sample fields at: (a) root, (b) inside addresses[*], and (c) inside periods[*]. Expected mappingset.manifest.json (pgsql + mssql) must include write plans with: child-table DeleteByParentSql hashes, batching info, deterministic bindings, and extension table plans in dependency order. Read plans for this resource remain null until story 05, and the manifest must represent read_plan as null.
steps-to-verify: Run (to refresh goldens when needed): UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit.csproj

description: Create a runtime plan compilation golden fixture that covers key unification with synthetic presence flags (DescriptorMember case). Acceptance: fixture produces a table with at least one KeyUnificationClass over two optional descriptor endpoints such that derivation creates: (a) a canonical stored column with SourceJsonPath null, and (b) synthetic ..._Present columns with SourceJsonPath null and NullOrTrue constraints. Expected mappingset.manifest.json must show: Precomputed bindings for canonical + synthetic presence columns, compiled KeyUnificationPlans with PresenceIsSynthetic=true, and hard failures when the NullOrTrue constraint is absent (unit test for negative case).
steps-to-verify: Run (to refresh goldens when needed): UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 dotnet test --no-restore ./src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Plans.Tests.Unit.csproj

description: Refactor or retire thin-slice-only write compilation code paths as needed without breaking read-plan thin-slice behavior. Acceptance: existing root-only write plan behavior remains supported via the new compiler, unit tests are updated accordingly, and all plan compilation tests (contracts, SQL foundations, caching, manifests) pass. MappingSetLookupExtensions messaging remains accurate: read-plan lookups still point to story 05/06 when omitted; write-plan lookups should not claim story-04 omission for relational-table resources after this story is implemented.
